base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of spiny_walk — a character from 1985 super mario bros. spiked koopa-variant that can't be stomped safely. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame walk — spiked koopa-variant that can't be stomped safely; spikes render on shell back
